title: Star Wars Retro Collection The Acolyte Multipack, 9.5-cm Action Figure 6-Pack
features: STAR WARS: THE ACOLYTE: this 9.5-cm action figure set (3.75 inch) is inspired by the live-action series on Disney+ – a great present for Star Wars collectors and fans ages 4 and up
KENNER-INSPIRED ARTICULATION AND DETAILING: featuring five points of articulation, these Star Wars figures can be displayed in action figure and vehicle collections
INCLUDES 6 FIGURES: this multipack includes Mother Aniseya, Jedi Knight Yord Fandar, Mae (Assassin), Jedi Master Sol, Osha Aniseya and Jedi Padawan Jecki Lon
SERIES-INSPIRED ACCESSORIES: these figures feature seven accessories for poseability on your shelf
KENNER-INSPIRED CARDBACKS: each figure in this vintage toys assortment features classic Kenner branding, as well as packaging treated with a weathered look
description: Product Description Ideal for new fans and long-time collectors alike, the Star Wars Retro Collection features detailing and design recalling the original 1970s and 1980s figures. Inspired by Star Wars: The Acolyte, this Retro Collection 9.5-cm-scale multipack is ideal for play or display, giving new entertainment a nostalgic feel. May the Force be with you! (Additional products each sold separately. Subject to availability.) Star Wars products are produced by Hasbro under licence from Lucasfilm Ltd HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc. Safety Warning Ages 4 and up WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD – Small parts. Not for children under 3 years.
